---
name: react-patterns
description: Use for React and JSX work across apps. Covers state, forms, and interaction defaults.
---

# React Patterns

## Rules

- Use Zustand for global UI state.
- Use React Query plus IndexedDB for server and local-first state.
- Use React Hook Form plus Zod for forms.
- Avoid inline JSX callbacks by default; memoize only after profiling justifies it.
- Prefer semantic HTML and accessible interactions.
